vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The biome is in a state of advanced degradation. The registry-defined specimens (P1-P4) are largely absent or non-viable. The white rabbit anchor is missing from the current frame.

inventory_reconciliation.P1_String_of_Nickels: Systemic Loss: Pot is present but appears devoid of viable foliage.
inventory_reconciliation.P2_Mexican_Mint: Systemic Loss: No identifiable mint foliage remains.
inventory_reconciliation.P3_Pothos: Systemic Loss: The anchor (rabbit) and primary foliage have been removed or have collapsed.
inventory_reconciliation.P4_Silver_Guest: Systemic Loss: No evidence of survival.

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty soil surface, no signs of growth.
plant_audit.P2_Black_Pot: Contains only debris (eggshells) and a single, chlorotic, dying leaf fragment.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears desiccated and dark; no signs of moisture or fungal activity.
biome_observations.surface_debris: Presence of crushed eggshells in P2/P3 area; a small electronic component (IC chip) has been introduced to the desk surface in later frames.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t_minus_2: Gradual loss of structural integrity; the Pothos leaf in the black pot shows progressive wilting and color loss.
temporal_deltas.t_minus_1_to_current: Total collapse of the remaining leaf structure; removal of the rabbit anchor; introduction of foreign debris (IC chip) to the desk surface.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome has suffered a total failure of the biological components. The plants are effectively dead or removed. The environment is now characterized by inert debris rather than active botanical life.
anomalies: Removal of the white rabbit scale anchor.
Introduction of an integrated circuit (IC) component onto the desk surface.
Accumulation of eggshell fragments within the pots.
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical sequence documents a rapid decline from a state of minimal occupancy to total biological vacancy. The initial images show a struggling Pothos leaf and a rabbit anchor; by the final frame, the plants have either perished or been cleared, leaving only soil and non-biological debris. The environment has transitioned from a botanical workspace to a site of material accumulation.
